data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the functionality to copy a link for sharing, which is a critical part of the user need. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations that the generated temporary link can be copied and shared through various channels. The linked use case mentions the generation of a temporary link but does not provide evidence of its shareability, leading to a gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the generated temporary link can be copied and shared via any channel.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to copy and share the link.
